# ByteBrew Engine
> Open infrastructure for autonomous AI agents. Configure in YAML, deploy with Docker, bring your own models.

ByteBrew Engine is a self-hosted AI agent runtime. It provides multi-agent orchestration, tool calling (MCP + declarative YAML), knowledge/RAG, background automation (cron, webhooks), and a REST API with SSE streaming. Free Community Edition with no limits.

## Getting Started
- [Quick Start](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/getting-started/quick-start/): Deploy Engine with Docker Compose in 5 minutes. One command, includes PostgreSQL.
- [Configuration Reference](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/getting-started/configuration/): YAML reference for agents, models, tools, MCP servers, triggers. Parameter tables with defaults.
- [API Reference](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/getting-started/api-reference/): REST API endpoints — chat (SSE), agents, models, sessions, tasks, config, health. Curl examples.

## Admin Dashboard
- [Login](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/admin/login/): JWT authentication, default credentials via environment variables.
- [Agents](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/admin/agents/): Create, edit, delete agents. Form fields: name, model, system prompt, tools, lifecycle, spawn rules.
- [Models](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/admin/models/): LLM provider management. Ollama, OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic. Connectivity verification.
- [MCP Servers](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/admin/mcp-servers/): Connect external tool servers via MCP protocol. Stdio, HTTP, SSE transports.
- [Tasks](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/admin/tasks/): Background task management with filters and pagination.
- [Triggers](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/admin/triggers/): Cron schedules and webhook endpoints for autonomous agent execution.
- [API Keys](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/admin/api-keys/): Token management with scopes (chat, tasks, agents:read, config, admin).
- [Settings](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/admin/settings/): BYOK configuration per provider, logging levels.
- [Config Management](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/admin/config-management/): Hot-reload, YAML export/import, config versioning.
- [Audit Log](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/admin/audit-log/): All configuration changes, auth events, API token lifecycle.

## Core Concepts
- [Agents & Lifecycle](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/concepts/agents/): Persistent vs spawn lifecycle. System prompts, max steps, context size.
- [Multi-Agent Orchestration](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/concepts/multi-agent/): Supervisor → sub-agents via can_spawn. Spawn tree, delegation patterns.
- [Tools](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/concepts/tools/): Built-in tools (20+), MCP servers, declarative YAML HTTP tools. Per-agent whitelisting.
- [Tasks & Jobs](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/concepts/tasks/): manage_tasks tool for persistent state. Background execution, status tracking.
- [Knowledge / RAG](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/concepts/knowledge/): Document ingestion (md, txt, pdf), vector search (pgvector), per-agent isolation.
- [Triggers](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/concepts/triggers/): Cron expressions, webhook endpoints with signature verification.

## Deployment
- [Docker](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/deployment/docker/): Docker Compose setup, host.docker.internal, volumes, environment variables, troubleshooting.
- [Model Selection](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/deployment/model-selection/): Tool calling requirements, provider comparison, recommended models (14B+ for stable tool calling).
- [Production](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/deployment/production/): VPS deployment, Caddy reverse proxy, systemd services, SSL/TLS.

## Integration
- [REST API Chat](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/integration/rest-api/): SSE event types (message_delta, tool_call, agent_spawn, done, etc.), session management, non-streaming mode.
- [Multi-Agent Configuration](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/integration/multi-agent/): Orchestrator pattern, complete YAML examples, per-agent models, tool isolation.
- [BYOK](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/integration/byok/): Per-request model override via X-Model-Provider/API-Key/Name headers.

## Examples
- [Sales Agent](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/examples/sales-agent/): Multi-agent sales with supervisor, product search, order management.
- [Support Agent](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/examples/support-agent/): Knowledge-based support with ticket creation and escalation.
- [DevOps Monitor](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/examples/devops-monitor/): Alert filtering with webhook triggers and automated remediation.
- [IoT Analyzer](https://docs.bytebrew.ai/examples/iot-analyzer/): Telemetry monitoring with anomaly detection.

## Links
- Website: https://bytebrew.ai
- Documentation: https://docs.bytebrew.ai
- Docker Hub: https://hub.docker.com/r/bytebrew/engine
- Pricing: https://bytebrew.ai/pricing
- Download: https://bytebrew.ai/download
